fire.name: Fire
fire.tagline: Passionate, bold, and driven by vision
fire.description: Fire signs burn bright with enthusiasm and creative force. You are motivated by inspiration, not routine — you need a mission to feel alive. Your energy is contagious, your courage is real, and your belief in possibility is unshakeable.
fire.shadow: Burnout, impatience, can overlook details in the rush forward

earth.name: Earth
earth.tagline: Grounded, practical, and built to last
earth.description: Earth signs build the world. You understand that lasting value comes from patience and precision. Where others dream, you create — methodically, beautifully, durably. You are the ones people turn to when it matters most.

air.name: Air
air.description: Air signs live in the realm of ideas. You are the connectors, the thinkers, the communicators who see patterns before anyone else. Your mind is your greatest tool — and your greatest adventure.
air.shadow: Overthinking, emotional detachment, difficulty settling down

water.name: Water
water.description: Water signs feel everything. Your emotional intelligence is extraordinary — you read people at depths they cannot access themselves. Your compassion, your intuition, and your ability to heal and connect are the rarest gifts.
